title: Love Island

characters.name: Iain Stirling
characters.archetype: The narrator. Scottish wit over every dramatic moment. The best part of the UK version.

characters.name: The Islanders
characters.archetype: The contestants — typically 10-12 to start, paired in couples. Couples shift over the season.

characters.name: Casa Amor cohort
characters.archetype: The 'bombshells' brought in mid-season to test couples. Often ends marriages.

characters.name: The Producers
characters.archetype: Never seen, always felt. Engineer drama via challenges, recouplings, and well-timed bombshells.

scenes: Casa Amor recouplings — when most relationships shatter.
The first 'I got a text!' moment of the season.
off_screen_drama: Multiple Islander deaths post-show triggered industry-wide mental health reforms.
The US version (Peacock) has its own fanbase but the UK is the gold standard.
